---
title: "Harness Engineering"
---

```{=html}
<div class="slide-embed">
  <iframe
    src="slides/harness-engineering/"
    title="Harness Engineering slides"
    allowfullscreen
    loading="lazy">
  </iframe>
</div>

<p class="slide-embed-link">
  <a class="slide-embed-button" href="slides/harness-engineering/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    Open slides in a new tab →
  </a>
</p>
```
